## Versioning checklist

- [ ] If this changes a durable decision, I added or updated an ADR.
- [ ] If this changes schema, I updated SQL and migration notes.
- [ ] If this changes prompt/model behavior, I recorded prompt/model/persona versions.
- [ ] If this changes safety behavior, I noted guardrail impact.
- [ ] If this is exported to Drive/HTML/PDF, the Git version remains the source of truth.
